summary: Two "Yolka" air defense drones executed a simultaneous kinetic intercept of an enemy fixed-wing UAV, with two mobile fire teams delivering a coordinated double strike. On April 3, 2026, the "Rubicon" Center destroyed 118 targets in the Donbas/Krasny Liman area, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, personnel, and command posts, while reporting 78,499 sorties in March 2026 that hit radar, EW systems, and UAV control points. Ukrainian operators from the 1st Separate Special Operations Center, with Defense Intelligence support, struck a Crimean UAV storage facility, destroying Orion-type drones valued at over $5 million each. In the Zaporizhzhia region, an FPV drone captured an airstrike on a Ukrainian air defense system in Vozdvizhevka. Russian Ka-52 crews were eliminated near Nadiivka after a crash landing, with follow-up drone strikes during evacuation.
